THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VEA, HOWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGO, BRIAN $46,213.88 PRINCIPAL, $5,700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $485.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $52,398.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-18-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing And Mtn For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

John H. Aspelin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, HOWARD VEA.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) BRIAN NGO. Defendant Brian Ngo present in court.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Howard Vea sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $46,213.88
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $5,700.00
Costs: $485.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $52,398.88
Judgment signed in open court.
